scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo 'Setup complete! Run npm run dev to start both servers.'
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules package-lock.json backend/package-lock.json frontend/package-lock.json
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run install:all
